description: Build week with HRV down, RHR and sleep worsening, while the user asks to keep 60 km and not reduce quality.

prev_plans_md:
prev_week_km: 58
Build W2 planned 58 km with Tue threshold and Sun 18 km long run.
prev_feedback_md: RPE 8/10. Legs heavy by Friday. Sleep was poor. No sharp pain, but easy pace felt harder than usual.
input.user_request_md: 下周想保持 60km，质量课不要少，感觉少练会掉状态。

schema_validity.behavior: valid WeeklyPlan with all dates in the target week

safety_load.behavior: does not chase the user's requested 60 km at the expense of recovery

progression.behavior: connects to prior 58 km week without making up fatigue

phase_fit.behavior: keeps build-phase stimulus but downshifts intensity

weekly_distribution.behavior: keeps hard work separated from long run and includes real rest

request_handling.behavior: acknowledges the pushback and explains the safe compromise

anti_patterns: two threshold/VO2 sessions despite bad recovery signals
blindly honors 60 km request without explaining recovery trade-off
long run over 35 percent of weekly volume
